mapper.select: SELECT s.seqid, s.usr_id, s.m_menu_id, s.m_pk_v, s.org_id, s.m_field_id, s.m_field_nm, s.m_old_v, s.m_old_disp_v, s.m_new_v, s.m_new_disp_v, s.m_datetime, s.DATA_TENANT_ID, s.LAST_CHG_USR, s.LAST_CHG_DT,asu.USER_NAME FROM s_modify_trace s left join admin_sm_user asu on s.LAST_CHG_USR =asu.user_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}

SELECT s.seqid, s.usr_id, s.m_menu_id, s.m_pk_v, s.org_id, s.m_field_id, s.m_field_nm, s.m_old_v, s.m_old_disp_v, s.m_new_v, s.m_new_disp_v, s.m_datetime, s.DATA_TENANT_ID, s.LAST_CHG_USR, s.LAST_CHG_DT,asu.USER_NAME FROM s_modify_trace s left join admin_sm_user asu on s.LAST_CHG_USR =asu.user_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}
